name: platform-features-manual-fetch
description: PlatformFeaturesPage loads data via mcpService.callTool('store.list', ...) directly in useEffect, storing results in React useState. This is NOT reactive - requires manual refresh button. No MST domain integration for platform-features schema.
recommendation: For real-time updates, create platformFeaturesDomain in state-api with MST stores, or use polling/websockets for live refresh.
